metadata.title: Sneaky Mid Push That Turns Into a Swift Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a well-timed mid push catches the enemy off guard for a quick double kill. Timing and positioning made all the difference here.
What’s your favorite way to surprise opponents in VALORANT?

Drop your best sneaky plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Drop your best sneaky plays in the comments!
